query: SELECT id, establishmentId, templateNewOrder, templatePreparing, notifyOnNewOrder, notifyOnPreparing, requireOrderConfirmation FROM whatsappConfig WHERE establishmentId IN (SELECT id FROM establishments ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3) ORDER BY id DESC;
